meta-description: Learn about hospitalization by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Hospitalization
excerpt: Care in a hospital that requires admission as an inpatient and usually requires an overnight stay. An overnight stay for observation could be outpatient care.
content: Care in a hospital that requires admission as an inpatient and usually requires an overnight stay. An overnight stay for observation could be outpatient care.
